summary: Excellent matrix recording captures what many consider the best night of the 1990 tour.
review: The reviewer hails this show as the highlight of the tour, calling it a great performance and the best night they heard. The matrix mix is described as beautiful with no noted flaws, making the listening experience especially enjoyable.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review praises both the musical performance and the matrix recording quality, indicating an outstanding show with excellent sound.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls the matrix mix "beautiful" and offers no criticism, suggesting clear, well‑balanced audio.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as the best night of the tour, implying a strong, cohesive set with excellent flow.
